variables.name: Unemployment Rate
variables.methodology: Calculated as the percentage of the labor force that is jobless and actively seeking employment, based on quarterly national surveys.

variables.name: Inflation Rate
variables.methodology: Consumer Price Index (CPI) year-on-year change, weighted across essential goods and services.

variables.name: Decree 54 Arrests
variables.methodology: Count of documented arrests and summonses under Decree 54, normalized against historical political detention averages.

variables.name: Protest Frequency
variables.methodology: Rolling 30-day average of protest events, weighted by participant count and geographic spread.
